abstract: Large pretrained vision encoders are central to multimodal intelligence, powering applications from on-device vision processing to vision-language models. Since these applications often demand real-time processing of massive visual data, reducing the inference cost of vision encoders is critical. Quantization offers a practical path, but it remains challenging even at 8-bit precision due to so-called outliers. In this work, we propose $\textit{RegCache}$, a training-free algorithm that mitigates outliers in large-scale pretrained vision encoders and serves as a plug-in module that can be applied on top of other quantization methods. RegCache introduces outlier-prone yet semantically meaningless prefix tokens to the vision encoder, which prevent other tokens from having outliers. Notably, we observe that outliers in vision encoders behave differently from those in language models, motivating two technical innovations: middle-layer prefixing and token deletion. Experimental results show that our method consistently improves quantized model performance across various vision encoders, particularly in extremely low-bit regimes (e.g., 4-bit).

light_analysis.overview: 提出 RegCache 免训练算法，通过引入前缀令牌缓解视觉编码器量化中的异常值问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模预训练视觉编码器在多模态智能中扮演核心角色，支持从设备端视觉处理到视觉语言模型的应用。这些应用常需实时处理海量视觉数据，降低推理成本至关重要。量化是可行途径，但由于激活值中存在异常值，即使在8位精度下量化效果也受限制。现有方法难以有效处理这些异常值，特别是在低比特率下，影响了模型在资源受限场景中的部署效率。因此，开发能缓解异常值的技术对提升量化性能具有重要实践意义。
light_analysis.method: RegCache 是一种无需额外训练的插件算法，通过向视觉编码器添加易于产生异常值但语义无意义的前缀令牌来'吸收'异常值，从而防止其他令牌受影响。关键技术创新包括基于视觉编码器异常值特性的中间层前缀化和令牌删除，以应对视觉与语言模型异常值的差异。该算法可作为独立模块应用于现有量化方法之上，增强其鲁棒性，无需修改原始模型架构或进行再训练。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，RegCache 方法在各种视觉编码器上能一致提升量化后的模型性能，特别是在极低比特率（如4位）设置下效果显著。与基线量化方法相比，该方法有效缓解了异常值导致的量化误差，实现了更稳定的性能改进。尽管摘要未明确说明具体指标数值，但强调了在极端条件下性能的提升，展示了其在资源节约型应用中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: RegCache 的主要贡献在于提供了一种训练免费的方法来解决视觉编码器量化中的异常值问题，通过前缀令牌机制改善了低比特量化的性能。该研究具有学术价值，揭示了视觉与语言模型异常值的差异并提出了针对性技术；实际应用价值在于其插件式设计便于集成，促进高效实时视觉处理。未来工作可进一步优化算法或扩展到更多模型类型和应用场景。

title: FSFSplatter: Build Surface and Novel Views with Sparse-Views within 2min
abstract: Gaussian Splatting has become a leading reconstruction technique, known for its high-quality novel view synthesis and detailed reconstruction. However, most existing methods require dense, calibrated views. Reconstructing from free sparse images often leads to poor surface due to limited overlap and overfitting. We introduce FSFSplatter, a new approach for fast surface reconstruction from free sparse images. Our method integrates end-to-end dense Gaussian initialization, camera parameter estimation, and geometry-enhanced scene optimization. Specifically, FSFSplatter employs a large Transformer to encode multi-view images and generates a dense and geometrically consistent Gaussian scene initialization via a self-splitting Gaussian head. It eliminates local floaters through contribution-based pruning and mitigates overfitting to limited views by leveraging depth and multi-view feature supervision with differentiable camera parameters during rapid optimization. FSFSplatter outperforms current state-of-the-art methods on widely used DTU, Replica, and BlendedMVS datasets.

light_analysis.overview: FSFSplatter提出了一种从稀疏视图中快速重建表面和生成新视图的创新方法，能在2分钟内完成高质量重建。
light_analysis.motivation: Gaussian Splatting作为主流重建技术，通常需要密集校准视图，但在实际应用中获取密集视图成本高昂。从自由稀疏图像重建常因视图重叠有限和模型过拟合导致表面质量差，现有方法难以有效处理稀疏视图问题，因此开发高效稀疏视图重建方法具有重要实用价值。
light_analysis.method: FSFSplatter集成端到端密集高斯初始化、相机参数估计和几何增强场景优化，使用大型Transformer编码多视图图像，通过自分裂高斯头生成密集且几何一致的高斯场景初始化，并采用基于贡献的剪枝消除局部浮动。在快速优化中，结合深度和多视图特征监督与可微相机参数，有效减轻过拟合，提升稀疏视图下的重建效率和质量。
light_analysis.result: FSFSplatter在DTU、Replica和BlendedMVS数据集上优于当前最先进方法，验证了其在稀疏视图重建中的性能优势。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但可推断在表面重建和新视图合成方面有显著改进，与基线方法相比表现出更高的鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出FSFSplatter方法，有效解决了稀疏视图重建中的过拟合和表面质量问题，学术上推动了Gaussian Splatting技术的发展，实际应用支持快速场景建模。摘要未明确说明潜在局限性或未来工作方向，但可推测未来可能进一步优化算法或扩展应用场景。

title: Splines-Based Feature Importance in Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks: A Framework for Supervised Tabular Data Dimensionality Reduction
abstract: Feature selection is a key step in many tabular prediction problems, where multiple candidate variables may be redundant, noisy, or weakly informative. We investigate feature selection based on Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks (KANs), which parameterize feature transformations with splines and expose per-feature importance scores in a natural way. From this idea we derive four KAN-based selection criteria (coefficient norms, gradient-based saliency, and knockout scores) and compare them with standard methods such as LASSO, Random Forest feature importance, Mutual Information, and SVM-RFE on a suite of real and synthetic classification and regression datasets. Using average F1 and $R^2$ scores across three feature-retention levels (20%, 40%, 60%), we find that KAN-based selectors are generally competitive with, and sometimes superior to, classical baselines. In classification, KAN criteria often match or exceed existing methods on multi-class tasks by removing redundant features and capturing nonlinear interactions. In regression, KAN-based scores provide robust performance on noisy and heterogeneous datasets, closely tracking strong ensemble predictors; we also observe characteristic failure modes, such as overly aggressive pruning with an $\ell_1$ criterion. Stability and redundancy analyses further show that KAN-based selectors yield reproducible feature subsets across folds while avoiding unnecessary correlation inflation, ensuring reliable and non-redundant variable selection. Overall, our findings demonstrate that KAN-based feature selection provides a powerful and interpretable alternative to traditional methods, capable of uncovering nonlinear and multivariate feature relevance beyond sparsity or impurity-based measures.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络的样条特征重要性框架，为表格数据降维提供非线性、可解释的特征选择方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 特征选择在表格预测问题中至关重要，但现有方法如LASSO、随机森林特征重要性常依赖线性假设或基于稀疏性的度量，难以有效处理冗余、噪声特征和非线性交互。Kolmogorov-Arnold网络通过样条参数化自然暴露每个特征的重要性分数，为解决这些问题提供了新视角。本研究旨在探索KAN-based特征选择，以改善对复杂特征关系的捕捉，并弥补传统方法的不足，从而提升预测模型在真实和合成数据集上的性能。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于Kolmogorov-Arnold网络，利用其样条参数化特征变换，推导出四种特征选择标准：系数范数、基于梯度的显著性、敲除分数。在多个真实和合成的分类与回归数据集上进行实验，使用特征保留级别20%、40%、60%，通过平均F1和R²分数评估性能。对比基线包括LASSO、随机森林特征重要性、互信息和SVM-RFE，以全面验证KAN-based方法的有效性和创新性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，KAN-based选择器在分类任务中常匹配或超越传统方法，尤其是在多类任务中，能有效移除冗余特征并捕捉非线性交互。回归任务中，在噪声和异构数据集上表现稳健，接近强集成预测器，但使用ℓ1准则时可能出现过度剪枝的失败模式。稳定性和冗余分析进一步表明，KAN方法能产生可重复的特征子集，避免不必要的相关性膨胀，确保了选择的可靠性和非冗余性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证实基于KAN的特征选择框架为表格数据降维提供了强大且可解释的替代方案，能揭示非线性、多变量特征相关性，超越传统基于稀疏性或杂质的度量。研究还指出了局限性，如ℓ1准则可能过于激进，为未来工作提供了改进方向。在学术上，该方法推动了可解释AI的发展；在实际应用中，提升了特征选择的准确性和鲁棒性，具有重要的理论和实践价值。

title: Blind to Position, Biased in Language: Probing Mid-Layer Representational Bias in Vision-Language Encoders for Zero-Shot Language-Grounded Spatial Understanding
abstract: Vision-Language Encoders (VLEs) are widely adopted as the backbone of zero-shot referring image segmentation (RIS), enabling text-guided localization without task-specific training. However, prior works underexplored the underlying biases within mid-layer representations that preserve positional and language-specific information. Through layer-wise investigation, we reveal that the conventionally used final-layer multimodal embeddings prioritize global semantic alignment, leading to two coupled consequences. First, vision embeddings exhibit weak sensitivity to positional cues. Second, multilingual text embeddings form language-dependent geometric shifts within the shared space. Motivated by these findings, we identify an underexplored pathway within VLE mid-layers to construct a spatial map, applicable for improving zero-shot RIS by 1-7 mIoU on nine RefCOCO benchmarks. Furthermore, leveraging mixed-language mid-layer embeddings yields enhanced spatial grounding accuracy (+7-8 mIoU and IoU@50), albeit with increased inference cost, and also improves performance on the zero-shot text-to-image retrieval task. Our work opens up the discussion about the effects of effective representational bias probing of VLEs for enhanced spatial grounding.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文揭示了视觉语言编码器中层表示的位置和语言偏置，并利用这些偏置改进零样本语言引导的空间定位任务性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言编码器（VLEs）广泛用于零样本指称图像分割（RIS），但现有方法依赖最后一层多模态嵌入，这些嵌入偏向全局语义对齐，导致视觉嵌入对位置线索弱敏感，多语言文本嵌入在共享空间中形成语言依赖的几何移位。这限制了空间定位的准确性，因为中层表示可能保留更多位置和语言信息，但先前工作未充分探索。因此，本研究旨在探测中层表示的偏置，以增强零样本语言引导的空间理解。
light_analysis.method: 本研究通过层级调查分析VLEs的中间层表示，识别位置敏感性和语言依赖性偏置。核心方法包括利用中层表示构建空间地图，用于零样本RIS。创新点在于替代传统最后一层嵌入，使用更位置敏感的视觉嵌入和语言依赖的文本嵌入，并采用混合语言的中层嵌入进一步提升空间定位。实验在九个RefCOCO基准上进行，但摘要未明确说明具体VLE模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示：构建空间地图后，零样本RIS在九个RefCOCO基准上提升1-7 mIoU；使用混合语言中层嵌入，空间定位准确性进一步提高+7-8 mIoU和IoU@50。与基线方法（传统使用最后一层嵌入）相比，性能显著改善。此外，该方法还提升了零样本文本到图像检索任务的性能，尽管混合语言嵌入增加了推理成本。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是揭示了VLEs中层表示的位置和语言偏置，并利用这些偏置改进零样本空间定位任务。学术上，它推动了VLEs表示偏置的研究，为增强语言引导的空间理解提供了新视角。实际应用中，提升了RIS和检索任务的性能，但混合语言嵌入的推理成本较高，未来工作可优化成本或扩展到其他任务。

title: Soft-Di[M]O: Improving One-Step Discrete Image Generation with Soft Embeddings
abstract: One-step generators distilled from Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) compress multiple sampling steps into a single forward pass, enabling efficient text and image synthesis. However, they suffer two key limitations: they inherit modeling bias from the teacher, and their discrete token outputs block gradient flow, preventing post-distillation refinements such as adversarial training, reward-based fine-tuning, and Test-Time Embedding Optimization (TTEO). In this work, we introduce soft embeddings, a simple relaxation that replaces discrete tokens with the expected embeddings under the generator's output distribution. Soft embeddings preserve representation fidelity for one-step discrete generator while providing a fully differentiable continuous surrogate that is compatible with teacher backbones and tokenizer decoders. Integrating soft embeddings into the Di[M]O distillation framework (denoted Soft-Di[M]O) makes one-step generators end-to-end trainable and enables straightforward application of GAN-based refinement, differentiable reward fine-tuning, and TTEO. Empirically, across multiple MDM teachers (e.g., MaskBit, MaskGen), Soft-Di[M]O achieves state-of-the-art one-step results: improved class-to-image performance, a one-step FID of 1.56 on ImageNet-256 with GAN-based refinement, along with higher GenEval and HPS scores on text-to-image with reward fine-tuning, and further gains from TTEO.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出Soft-Di[M]O方法，通过软嵌入技术使一步离散图像生成器可端到端训练，提高了生成效率和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决一步离散图像生成器的局限性。这些生成器通过蒸馏掩码扩散模型实现高效合成，但存在两个关键问题：继承教师模型的建模偏差，以及离散token输出阻止梯度流，无法进行后蒸馏优化如对抗训练、奖励微调和测试时嵌入优化。这些问题限制了生成器的进一步改进，在需要高效实时图像生成的应用中尤为重要，因为现有方法无法在保持效率的同时应用高级优化技术来提升质量和适应性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法的核心是引入soft embeddings，将离散token替换为生成器输出分布下的期望嵌入。这种方法保留了表示保真度，同时提供完全可微分的连续代理，兼容教师主干和tokenizer解码器。通过集成到Di[M]O蒸馏框架，形成Soft-Di[M]O，使一步生成器端到端可训练，并支持GAN精化、可微分奖励微调和测试时嵌入优化，从而简化了后蒸馏改进过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Soft-Di[M]O在多个掩码扩散模型教师上取得最先进的一步结果。具体表现包括：类到图像性能提升；在ImageNet-256上，经过GAN精化后的一步FID为1.56；在文本到图像任务中，GenEval和HPS分数更高；测试时嵌入优化带来进一步增益。与基线方法相比，这些指标证实了方法的有效性，尤其在提高生成质量和适应性方面。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出soft embeddings和Soft-Di[M]O框架，解决了一步生成器的可训练性问题，使其能够进行后蒸馏优化。学术上，推动了高效图像生成模型的发展；实际应用中，提高了合成效率和质量，支持实时图像生成和文本到图像任务。尽管摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可扩展到其他生成任务或集成更多优化技术，进一步提升性能。

title: LucidFlux: Caption-Free Photo-Realistic Image Restoration via a Large-Scale Diffusion Transformer
abstract: Image restoration (IR) aims to recover images degraded by unknown mixtures while preserving semanticsconditions under which discriminative restorers and UNet-based diffusion priors often oversmooth, hallucinate, or drift. We present LucidFlux, a caption-free IR framework that adapts a large diffusion transformer (Flux.1) without image captions. Our LucidFlux introduces a lightweight dual-branch conditioner that injects signals from the degraded input and a lightly restored proxy to respectively anchor geometry and suppress artifacts. Then, a timestep- and layer-adaptive modulation schedule is designed to route these cues across the backbones hierarchy, in order to yield coarse-to-fine and context-aware updates that protect the global structure while recovering texture. After that, to avoid the latency and instability of text prompts or Vision-Language Model (VLM) captions, we enforce caption-free semantic alignment via SigLIP features extracted from the proxy. A scalable curation pipeline further filters large-scale data for structure-rich supervision. Across synthetic and in-the-wild benchmarks, our LucidFlux consistently outperforms strong open-source and commercial baselines, and ablation studies verify the necessity of each component. LucidFlux shows that, for large DiTs, when, where, and what to condition onrather than adding parameters or relying on text promptsis the governing lever for robust and caption-free image restoration in the wild.

light_analysis.overview: LucidFlux 通过大型扩散变换器和自适应条件调制，实现了无需文本标题的高质量图像恢复。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像恢复任务中，现有方法如判别性恢复器和基于 UNet 的扩散先验容易导致图像过度平滑、幻觉或漂移，破坏语义条件。依赖文本提示或视觉语言模型标题的方法存在延迟和不稳定性问题，因此需要一种鲁棒且无需外部标题的图像恢复框架，以在真实世界应用中保护全局结构并恢复纹理，提升恢复的自然性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 LucidFlux 框架，基于大型扩散变换器 Flux.1，引入轻量级双分支条件器，分别注入退化输入和轻恢复代理的信号以锚定几何和抑制伪影。设计了时间步和层次自适应的调制调度，跨骨干层次路由线索，实现从粗到细、上下文感知的更新。为避免文本提示的延迟，使用 SigLIP 特征进行无标题语义对齐，并通过可扩展策划管道过滤大规模数据以提供结构丰富的监督，增强恢复的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 在合成和实际基准测试中，LucidFlux 持续优于强大的开源和商业基线，表现出优越的恢复性能。消融研究验证了每个组件（如双分支条件器、调制调度和语义对齐）的必要性，但摘要未明确说明具体准确率或效率改进数据，仅强调框架在真实场景中的鲁棒性和整体性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: LucidFlux 的主要贡献在于展示了对于大型扩散变换器，条件调制的时机、位置和内容是实现鲁棒无标题图像恢复的关键杠杆，而非依赖增加参数或文本提示。该研究为图像恢复领域提供了创新方法，具有学术价值并推动实际应用，未来可探索更高效的条件机制或扩展到其他视觉任务，如视频恢复或多模态处理。

title: Investigating Faithfulness in Large Audio Language Models
abstract: Large Audio Language Models (LALMs) integrate audio encoders with pretrained Large Language Models to perform complex multimodal reasoning tasks. While these models can generate Chain-of-Thought (CoT) explanations, the faithfulness of these reasoning chains remains unclear. In this work, we propose a systematic framework to evaluate CoT faithfulness in LALMs with respect to both the input audio and the final model prediction. We define three criteria for audio faithfulness: hallucination-free, holistic, and attentive listening. We also introduce a benchmark based on both audio and CoT interventions to assess faithfulness. Experiments on Audio Flamingo 3 and Qwen2.5-Omni suggest a potential multimodal disconnect: reasoning often aligns with the final prediction but is not always strongly grounded in the audio and can be vulnerable to hallucinations or adversarial perturbations.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一个系统性框架，用于评估大型音频语言模型中推理链的忠实性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型音频语言模型结合音频编码器和预训练大语言模型，执行复杂多模态推理任务，能生成推理链解释，但其忠实性未被充分研究。这个问题重要，因为不忠实的推理可能误导用户或影响模型在实际应用中的可信度。现有方法侧重于性能提升，而忽视了推理过程的内在忠实性评估，导致潜在幻觉或对抗性扰动风险。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出一个系统性框架，以评估大型音频语言模型中推理链的忠实性，针对输入音频和最终模型预测。该框架定义了三个音频忠实性标准：无幻觉、整体性和专注聆听，并引入基于音频和推理链干预的基准测试来量化评估。实验在Audio Flamingo 3和Qwen2.5-Omni模型上进行，通过干预方法验证框架的有效性和技术特色。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在Audio Flamingo 3和Qwen2.5-Omni模型上，推理链常与最终预测一致，但并非总是紧密基于音频输入，且容易受到幻觉或对抗性扰动的影响（摘要未明确说明具体性能指标）。这揭示了多模态模型在忠实性上的潜在缺陷，与基线方法相比，突出了评估框架的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了系统性框架和基准，用于评估大型音频语言模型中推理链的忠实性，揭示了多模态脱节问题。学术价值在于促进多模态模型的可解释性和可信度研究；实际应用价值为开发更可靠的音频AI系统提供指导。局限性包括未涵盖所有模型类型，未来工作可扩展到更多数据集和模型优化以增强忠实性。

title: Closed-form $\ell_r$ norm scaling with data for overparameterized linear regression and diagonal linear networks under $\ell_p$ bias
abstract: For overparameterized linear regression with isotropic Gaussian design and minimum-$\ell_p$ interpolator $p\in(1,2]$, we give a unified, high-probability characterization for the scaling of the family of parameter norms $ \\{ \lVert \widehat{w_p} \rVert_r \\}_{r \in [1,p]} $ with sample size. We solve this basic, but unresolved question through a simple dual-ray analysis, which reveals a competition between a signal *spike* and a *bulk* of null coordinates in $X^\top Y$, yielding closed-form predictions for (i) a data-dependent transition $n_\star$ (the "elbow"), and (ii) a universal threshold $r_\star=2(p-1)$ that separates $\lVert \widehat{w_p} \rVert_r$'s which plateau from those that continue to grow with an explicit exponent. This unified solution resolves the scaling of *all* $\ell_r$ norms within the family $r\in [1,p]$ under $\ell_p$-biased interpolation, and explains in one picture which norms saturate and which increase as $n$ grows. We then study diagonal linear networks (DLNs) trained by gradient descent. By calibrating the initialization scale $α$ to an effective $p_{\mathrm{eff}}(α)$ via the DLN separable potential, we show empirically that DLNs inherit the same elbow/threshold laws, providing a predictive bridge between explicit and implicit bias. Given that many generalization proxies depend on $\lVert \widehat {w_p} \rVert_r$, our results suggest that their predictive power will depend sensitively on which $l_r$ norm is used.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了过参数化线性回归和对角线性网络在 $\ell_p$ 偏置下 $\ell_r$ 范数缩放的封闭形式定律，统一解释了范数的饱和和增长行为。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决过参数化线性回归中，使用最小-$\ell_p$ 插值器时，$\ell_r$ 范数随样本大小如何缩放的基本问题。这个问题的重要性在于，许多泛化性能的代理指标（如范数）依赖于这些范数的值，但现有研究未能提供统一的缩放定律。通过揭示 $\ell_p$ 偏置下范数行为的通用规律，可以为理解和预测机器学习模型的泛化能力提供理论支持，弥补理论空白。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种简单的对偶射线分析方法，用于推导过参数化线性回归中 $\ell_r$ 范数的缩放规律。该方法通过分析设计矩阵 $X^\top Y$ 中的信号尖峰和空坐标主体之间的竞争，预测出数据依赖的转换点 $n_\star$（称为“elbow”）和通用阈值 $r_\star=2(p-1)$。对于对角线性网络，通过初始化尺度 $\alpha$ 校准到有效 $p_{\mathrm{eff}}(\alpha)$，并利用可分离势进行实证验证，建立了显式偏置（$\ell_p$）与隐式偏置（DLNs 训练）之间的桥梁。
light_analysis.result: 研究结果表明，$\ell_r$ 范数的缩放规律包括一个数据依赖的转换点 $n_\star$ 和一个通用阈值 $r_\star=2(p-1)$。当 $r < r_\star$ 时，范数趋于饱和；当 $r \geq r_\star$ 时，范数以明确指数继续增长。对于对角线性网络，实证验证了相似的缩放定律，表明 DLNs 继承了 $\ell_p$ 偏置的行为。这些封闭形式预测为理解范数行为提供了高概率特征化，支持泛化代理指标的敏感分析。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于为过参数化线性回归和对角线性网络提供了 $\ell_r$ 范数缩放的统一理论框架。通过封闭形式的定律，解释了 $\ell_p$ 偏置下范数的饱和和增长行为，并实证验证了 DLNs 中的相似规律，增强了我们对机器学习模型中偏置效应的理解，并为泛化能力的预测提供了理论基础。未来工作可进一步探索其他模型或偏置形式的缩放定律，以扩展应用范围。

title: Pi-transformer: A prior-informed dual-attention model for multivariate time-series anomaly detection
abstract: Anomalies in multivariate time series often arise from temporal context and cross-channel coordination rather than isolated outliers. We present Pi-Transformer (Prior-Informed Transformer), a transformer with two attention pathways: data-driven series attention and a smoothly evolving prior attention that encodes temporal invariants such as scale-related self-similarity and phase synchrony. The prior provides an amplitude-insensitive temporal reference that calibrates reconstruction error. During training, we pair a reconstruction objective with a divergence term that encourages agreement between the two attentions while keeping them meaningfully distinct. The prior is regularised to evolve smoothly and is lightly distilled towards dataset-level statistics. At inference, the model combines an alignment-weighted reconstruction signal (Energy) with a mismatch signal that highlights timing and phase disruptions, and fuses them into a single score for detection. Across five benchmarks (SMD, MSL, SMAP, SWaT, and PSM), Pi-Transformer achieves state-of-the-art or highly competitive F1, with particular strength on timing and phase-breaking anomalies. Case analyses show complementary behaviour of the two streams and interpretable detections around regime changes. Embedding prior attention into transformer scoring yields a calibrated and robust approach to anomaly detection in complex multivariate systems.

light_analysis.overview: Pi-Transformer提出了一种结合数据驱动注意力和先验注意力的Transformer模型，用于多元时间序列异常检测，通过编码时间不变性以校准重建误差，创新性地改进了复杂模式捕捉。
light_analysis.motivation: 多元时间序列中的异常通常源于时间上下文和跨通道协调，而非孤立异常值，现有方法可能难以有效捕捉这些复杂模式。本研究旨在解决这个问题，因为异常检测在工业监控等领域至关重要，但传统方法在识别时间和相位相关异常时存在不足，导致检测精度受限。通过引入先验信息，本研究试图弥补这一空白，提升检测的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: Pi-Transformer采用双注意力机制：数据驱动的序列注意力和平滑演化的先验注意力，后者编码时间不变性（如尺度相关自相似性和相位同步）。训练时结合重建目标和散度项，鼓励两个注意力一致但保持区别；先验通过正则化平滑演化，并轻微蒸馏向数据集级统计。推理时，模型融合对齐加权重建信号（能量）和不匹配信号（突出时间和相位破坏），生成统一检测分数。关键创新在于将先验信息嵌入Transformer架构，以提供振幅不敏感的时间参考。
light_analysis.result: 在五个基准测试集（SMD、MSL、SMAP、SWaT、PSM）上，Pi-Transformer达到了最先进或高度竞争力的F1分数，尤其在时间和相位破坏异常上表现突出。与基线方法相比，模型显示出优越性能，案例分析证实两个注意力流的互补行为，提升了检测的可解释性，特别是在制度变化周围。摘要未提供具体数据细节，但强调了整体竞争力和特定优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是Pi-Transformer模型，通过结合先验注意力，为复杂多元系统提供了校准和稳健的异常检测方法。学术价值在于扩展了Transformer在时间序列分析中的应用，引入先验信息以增强模型解释性和性能；实际应用中，它能更准确识别复杂异常，适用于工业监控等场景。未来工作可探索更多先验类型或应用扩展，但存在局限性如摘要未明确说明计算复杂度。

title: A Re-ranking Method using K-nearest Weighted Fusion for Person Re-identification
abstract: In person re-identification, re-ranking is a crucial step to enhance the overall accuracy by refining the initial ranking of retrieved results. Previous studies have mainly focused on features from single-view images, which can cause view bias and issues like pose variation, viewpoint changes, and occlusions. Using multi-view features to present a person can help reduce view bias. In this work, we present an efficient re-ranking method that generates multi-view features by aggregating neighbors' features using K-nearest Weighted Fusion (KWF) method. Specifically, we hypothesize that features extracted from re-identification models are highly similar when representing the same identity. Thus, we select K neighboring features in an unsupervised manner to generate multi-view features. Additionally, this study explores the weight selection strategies during feature aggregation, allowing us to identify an effective strategy. Our re-ranking approach does not require model fine-tuning or extra annotations, making it applicable to large-scale datasets. We evaluate our method on the person re-identification datasets Market1501, MSMT17, and Occluded-DukeMTMC. The results show that our method significantly improves Rank@1 and mAP when re-ranking the top M candidates from the initial ranking results. Specifically, compared to the initial results, our re-ranking method achieves improvements of 9.8%/22.0% in Rank@1 on the challenging datasets: MSMT17 and Occluded-DukeMTMC, respectively. Furthermore, our approach demonstrates substantial enhancements in computational efficiency compared to other re-ranking methods. Code is available at https://github.com/chequanghuy/Enhancing-Person-Re-Identification-via-UFFM-and-AMC.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于K-最近邻加权融合的再排序方法，用于行人再识别，通过生成多视角特征提升准确率和计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 行人再识别中，再排序是提高准确性的关键步骤，但现有方法主要依赖单视角图像特征，这会导致视角偏差，并面临姿态变化、视角改变和遮挡等问题。使用多视角特征可以有效减少这种偏差，然而先前研究对此利用不足，限制了性能提升。本研究旨在开发一种高效的再排序方法，以解决这些实际问题，提升复杂场景下的再识别效果。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出K-最近邻加权融合（KWF）方法，生成多视角特征。基于假设：从再识别模型中提取的同一身份特征高度相似，以无监督方式选择K个邻近特征进行聚合。同时，探索权重选择策略以优化特征融合过程。该方法无需模型微调或额外标注，适用于大规模数据集，并在Market1501、MSMT17和Occluded-DukeMTMC数据集上进行评估。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在行人再识别数据集上显著提升Rank@1和mAP指标。具体地，在MSMT17数据集上，Rank@1提高9.8%；在Occluded-DukeMTMC数据集上，提高22.0%。与初始排名结果相比，再排序效果明显，且相较于其他再排序方法，计算效率有大幅提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出了一种高效的再排序方法，利用KWF生成多视角特征，有效减少视角偏差，提升行人再识别准确率和效率。该方法无需额外训练或标注，具有较高的实用性和可扩展性，未来工作可进一步优化权重策略或扩展至其他视觉任务。

title: CausalARC: Abstract Reasoning with Causal World Models
abstract: On-the-fly reasoning often requires adaptation to novel problems under limited data and distribution shift. This work introduces CausalARC: an experimental testbed for AI reasoning in low-data and out-of-distribution regimes, modeled after the Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC). Each CausalARC reasoning task is sampled from a fully specified causal world model, formally expressed as a structural causal model. Principled data augmentations provide observational, interventional, and counterfactual feedback about the world model in the form of few-shot, in-context learning demonstrations. As a proof-of-concept, we illustrate the use of CausalARC for four language model evaluation settings: (1) abstract reasoning with test-time training, (2) counterfactual reasoning with in-context learning, (3) program synthesis, and (4) causal discovery with logical reasoning. Within- and between-model performance varied heavily across tasks, indicating room for significant improvement in language model reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 本文引入CausalARC，一个基于因果世界模型的AI推理测试床，用于评估低数据和分布外情况下的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决AI在快速推理中适应新问题、数据有限和分布变化时的挑战。实际应用中，现有方法常因依赖大量数据或难以泛化而表现不足，导致在动态环境中推理能力受限。通过建立标准化的测试环境，CausalARC有助于深入评估和改进AI模型的适应性推理，填补了现有基准在因果和少样本推理方面的空白。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出了CausalARC测试床，它以Abstraction and Reasoning Corpus (ARC)为模型基础，通过结构因果模型定义因果世界模型，生成多样化的推理任务。关键创新在于利用原则性数据增强，提供观测、干预和反事实反馈的少样本示范，支持上下文学习。作为概念验证，CausalARC应用于四个评估设置：抽象推理、反事实推理、程序合成以及因果发现与逻辑推理，具体使用语言模型进行实验验证。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果数据，但提到模型内和模型间性能在不同任务中变化显著，表明当前语言模型在CausalARC测试下的推理能力存在不一致性，有显著改进空间。这暗示了基线方法可能在因果推理和少样本学习方面表现不足，需要通过进一步实验来量化准确率或效率的提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: CausalARC为AI推理研究提供了一个有价值的测试平台，突出了因果世界模型在评估和改进推理能力中的应用潜力。研究贡献包括标准化评估框架和揭示模型局限性，具有促进学术进展和实际推理系统开发的学术价值。未来工作可针对提升模型在分布外和因果推理任务中的性能，或扩展测试床到更多领域。

title: GenCompositor: Generative Video Compositing with Diffusion Transformer
abstract: Video compositing combines live-action footage to create video production, serving as a crucial technique in video creation and film production. Traditional pipelines require intensive labor efforts and expert collaboration, resulting in lengthy production cycles and high manpower costs. To address this issue, we automate this process with generative models, called generative video compositing. This new task strives to adaptively inject identity and motion information of foreground video to the target video in an interactive manner, allowing users to customize the size, motion trajectory, and other attributes of the dynamic elements added in final video. Specifically, we designed a novel Diffusion Transformer (DiT) pipeline based on its intrinsic properties. To maintain consistency of the target video before and after editing, we revised a light-weight DiT-based background preservation branch with masked token injection. As to inherit dynamic elements from other sources, a DiT fusion block is proposed using full self-attention, along with a simple yet effective foreground augmentation for training. Besides, for fusing background and foreground videos with different layouts based on user control, we developed a novel position embedding, named Extended Rotary Position Embedding (ERoPE). Finally, we curated a dataset comprising 61K sets of videos for our new task, called VideoComp. This data includes complete dynamic elements and high-quality target videos. Experiments demonstrate that our method effectively realizes generative video compositing, outperforming existing possible solutions in fidelity and consistency. Project is available at https://gencompositor.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出GenCompositor，一个基于扩散变换器的生成式视频合成方法，能自动化视频合成并允许用户自定义动态元素。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频合成是视频创作和电影制作的关键技术，但传统流程依赖大量人力和专家协作，导致生产周期长、成本高。现有方法缺乏自动化，难以高效处理用户交互式的动态元素注入。因此，本研究旨在通过生成模型自动化视频合成过程，解决传统方法的效率和可扩展性问题，推动视频制作领域的智能化发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文设计了一个基于扩散变换器（DiT）的管道，关键创新包括：使用轻量级DiT背景保护分支通过掩码令牌注入保持视频一致性；提出DiT融合块利用全自注意力机制继承源视频动态元素；开发扩展旋转位置嵌入（ERoPE）以融合不同布局的视频；并构建了包含61K视频集的数据集VideoComp，用于训练和评估新任务。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该方法在生成式视频合成任务中，在忠实度和一致性方面优于现有可能解决方案。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但验证了框架在保持视频质量和动态元素整合上的有效性，为自动视频编辑提供了可行的技术路线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出GenCompositor框架，结合扩散变换器和扩展位置嵌入技术，实现了自动化视频合成。这不仅在学术上推动生成式视频编辑研究，还具有实际应用价值，能降低制作成本和提高效率。摘要未明确说明未来工作方向，但暗示了优化和扩展应用的可能性。

title: Single Agent Robust Deep Reinforcement Learning for Bus Fleet Control
abstract: Bus bunching remains a challenge for urban transit due to stochastic traffic and passenger demand. Traditional solutions rely on multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in loop-line settings, which overlook realistic operations characterized by heterogeneous routes, timetables, fluctuating demand, and varying fleet sizes. We propose a novel single-agent reinforcement learning (RL) framework for bus holding control that avoids the data imbalance and convergence issues of MARL under near-realistic simulation. A bidirectional timetabled network with dynamic passenger demand is constructed. The key innovation is reformulating the multi-agent problem into a single-agent one by augmenting the state space with categorical identifiers (vehicle ID, station ID, time period) in addition to numerical features (headway, occupancy, velocity). This high-dimensional encoding enables single-agent policies to capture inter-agent dependencies, analogous to projecting non-separable inputs into a higher-dimensional space. We further design a structured reward function aligned with operational goals: instead of exponential penalties on headway deviations, a ridge-shaped reward balances uniform headways and schedule adherence. Experiments show that our modified soft actor-critic (SAC) achieves more stable and superior performance than benchmarks, including MADDPG (e.g., -430k vs. -530k under stochastic conditions). These results demonstrate that single-agent deep RL, when enhanced with categorical structuring and schedule-aware rewards, can effectively manage bus holding in non-loop, real-world contexts. This paradigm offers a robust, scalable alternative to MARL frameworks, particularly where agent-specific experiences are imbalanced.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种单代理深度强化学习框架，通过增强状态空间将多代理公交车队控制问题转化为单代理，有效解决了传统方法的数据不平衡和收敛问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 公交车群问题是城市公共交通效率低下的关键因素，由随机交通流和乘客需求波动引发。传统多代理强化学习（MARL）方法通常在环形线路模拟中应用，但忽略了现实操作中的异质路线、不同时间表、需求动态变化和车队规模差异，导致数据不平衡和训练收敛困难，限制了其在复杂公交系统中的应用价值。因此，开发一个更稳定、适应现实场景的控制框架至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文构建了双向时间表网络以模拟动态乘客需求，核心方法是设计单代理强化学习框架。通过将多代理问题转化为单代理：增强状态空间，包括数值特征（如车头时距、占用率、速度）和类别标识符（车辆ID、站点ID、时间段），形成高维编码，使单代理策略能够捕捉代理间依赖关系。此外，设计了结构化奖励函数，采用岭形奖励来平衡均匀车头时距和时间表遵循，而非指数惩罚，并使用修改的软演员-评论家（SAC）算法进行训练。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，提出的方法在随机条件下比基准方法表现更稳定和优越。具体数据中，修改的软演员-评论家（SAC）在奖励值上达到-430k，而多代理深度确定性策略梯度（MADDPG）为-530k，显示出显著的性能提升。该框架在模拟公交车队控制任务中展示了更高的效率和鲁棒性，验证了单代理强化学习在增强状态空间和奖励函数后的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究的主要贡献是提出并验证了一个增强的单代理深度强化学习框架，用于公交车队控制，通过结构化状态空间和奖励函数设计，克服了多代理强化学习的局限性。该框架为现实世界非环形公交系统提供了鲁棒、可扩展的解决方案，学术价值在于展示了多代理问题向单代理转化的技术途径，实际应用价值在于优化公共交通运营效率。未来工作可探索该方法在其他交通场景或更复杂环境中的扩展。

title: All-in-One Slider for Attribute Manipulation in Diffusion Models
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models have made significant strides in generating high-quality images. However, progressively manipulating certain attributes of generated images to meet the desired user expectations remains challenging, particularly for content with rich details, such as human faces. Some studies have attempted to address this by training slider modules. However, they follow a **One-for-One** manner, where an independent slider is trained for each attribute, requiring additional training whenever a new attribute is introduced. This not only results in parameter redundancy accumulated by sliders but also restricts the flexibility of practical applications and the scalability of attribute manipulation. To address this issue, we introduce the **All-in-On** Slider, a lightweight module that decomposes the text embedding space into sparse, semantically meaningful attribute directions. Once trained, it functions as a general-purpose slider, enabling interpretable and fine-grained continuous control over various attributes. Moreover, by recombining the learned directions, the All-in-One Slider supports the composition of multiple attributes and zero-shot manipulation of unseen attributes (e.g., races and celebrities). Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method enables accurate and scalable attribute manipulation, achieving notable improvements compared to previous methods. Furthermore, our method can be extended to integrate with the inversion framework to perform attribute manipulation on real images, broadening its applicability to various real-world scenarios. The code is available on [our project](https://github.com/ywxsuperstar/ksaedit) page.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了All-in-One Slider，一种轻量级模块，通过分解文本嵌入空间为稀疏语义方向，实现扩散模型中多属性的可解释和细粒度连续控制。
light_analysis.motivation: T2I扩散模型生成高质量图像，但在逐步操纵属性以符合用户期望方面，尤其是细节丰富内容如人脸，仍具挑战。现有方法采用One-for-One方式，每个属性训练独立滑块，导致参数冗余、灵活性受限，且可扩展性差，每当新属性引入都需额外训练。这限制了实际应用场景，促使研究者开发更高效和通用的解决方案，以解决参数积累和扩展性问题。
light_analysis.method: 方法核心是All-in-One Slider，一个轻量级模块，通过分解文本嵌入空间为稀疏、语义明确的属性方向。训练完成后，该模块作为通用滑块，实现各种属性的可解释和细粒度连续控制。关键创新包括支持学习方向的重新组合，以进行多属性组合和零样本操纵未见属性，如种族和名人。此外，方法可扩展到与反转框架集成，用于真实图像的属性操纵，使用数据集和模型架构细节在摘要中未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，该方法在属性操纵方面实现了准确性和可扩展性的显著改进，优于先前方法。它支持零样本操纵未见属性，并在与反转框架结合时，拓宽应用范围到真实图像。具体性能提升和数据对比在摘要中未详细说明，但结果表明整体效果优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是All-in-One Slider，解决了扩散模型属性操纵的参数冗余和可扩展性问题，学术价值在于提出了通用且高效的操纵技术，实际应用扩展到真实图像处理，增强了模型实用性。局限性或未来工作方向在摘要中未明确说明，但方法具有潜力用于更多场景和属性优化。

title: Physics-informed neural network for predicting fatigue life of unirradiated and irradiated austenitic and ferritic/martensitic steels under reactor-relevant conditions
abstract: This study proposes a Physics-Informed Neural Network (PINN) framework to predict the low-cycle fatigue (LCF) life of irradiated austenitic and ferritic/martensitic (F/M) steels used in nuclear reactors. These materials undergo cyclic loading, neutron irradiation, and elevated temperatures, leading to complex degradation mechanisms that are difficult to capture with conventional empirical or purely data-driven models. The proposed PINN embeds fatigue-life governing physical constraints into the loss function, enabling physically consistent learning while improving predictive accuracy, reliability, and generalizability. The model was trained on 495 strain-controlled fatigue data points spanning irradiated and unirradiated conditions. Compared with traditional machine learning approaches, including Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, eXtreme Gradient Boosting, and conventional neural networks, the PINN demonstrated superior performance. SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) analysis identified strain amplitude, irradiation dose, and test temperature as the dominant features, each exhibiting physically meaningful inverse correlations with fatigue life. Univariate and multivariate analyses revealed clear alloy-specific degradation characteristics. Austenitic steels exhibited strong nonlinear coupling among strain amplitude, irradiation dose, and temperature, resulting in pronounced fatigue degradation under combined loading. In contrast, F/M steels demonstrated comparatively stable irradiation responses, including dose-saturation behavior, but showed sensitivity to elevated temperatures beyond tempering thresholds. Overall, the proposed PINN framework serves as a reliable and interpretable tool for reactor-relevant fatigue assessment, enabling performance evaluation for advanced nuclear applications.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出物理信息神经网络框架，用于预测核反应堆钢材料的低循环疲劳寿命，通过嵌入物理约束提高预测准确性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 核反应堆中使用的奥氏体和铁素体/马氏体钢在循环加载、中子辐照和高温环境下，疲劳寿命预测面临复杂降解机制的挑战。传统经验模型或纯数据驱动方法难以准确捕捉这些物理过程，导致预测可靠性不足，影响核设施的安全评估和寿命管理。因此，需要一种能够融合物理知识的智能模型来提升预测性能。
light_analysis.method: 该研究提出了一个物理信息神经网络（PINN）框架，通过将疲劳寿命控制的物理约束嵌入损失函数，实现物理一致的学习，以改进预测准确性、可靠性和泛化性。模型基于495个应变控制疲劳数据点进行训练，涵盖辐照和未辐照条件。关键创新在于结合深度学习和物理原理，无需依赖大量数据即可捕捉材料降解机制。摘要未明确说明具体的神经网络架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，PINN框架在预测疲劳寿命方面优于多种传统机器学习方法，包括随机森林、梯度提升、极限梯度提升和传统神经网络，表现出优越性能。SHAP分析识别应变幅度、辐照剂量和测试温度为关键特征，与疲劳寿命呈物理意义的逆相关。单变量和多变量分析揭示了合金特定降解特性，如奥氏体钢的强非线性耦合和F/M钢的剂量饱和行为，验证了模型的可解释性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究表明，物理信息神经网络框架能够有效预测核反应堆钢材料的疲劳寿命，提供可靠且可解释的评估工具，支持先进核应用的性能评估。该研究提升了疲劳寿命预测的准确性和可靠性，具有重要的学术和工程价值。然而，摘要未明确说明模型的局限性，未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多材料或优化物理约束集成。

title: DriveSplat: Unified Neural Gaussian Reconstruction for Dynamic Driving Scenes
abstract: Reconstructing large-scale dynamic driving scenes remains challenging due to the coexistence of static environments with extreme depth variation and diverse dynamic actors exhibiting complex motions. Existing Gaussian Splatting based methods have primarily focused on limited-scale or object-centric settings, and their applicability to large-scale dynamic driving scenes remains underexplored, particularly in the presence of extreme scale variation and non-rigid motions. In this work, we propose DriveSplat, a unified neural Gaussian framework for reconstructing dynamic driving scenes within a unified Gaussian-based representation. For static backgrounds, we introduce a scene-aware learnable level-of-detail (LOD) modeling strategy that explicitly accounts for near, intermediate, and far depth ranges in driving environments, enabling adaptive multi-scale Gaussian allocation. For dynamic actors, we use an object-centric formulation with neural Gaussian primitives, modeling motion through a global rigid transformation and handling non-rigid dynamics via a two-stage deformation that first adjusts anchors and subsequently updates the Gaussians. To further regularize the optimization, we incorporate dense depth and surface normal priors from pre-trained models as auxiliary supervision. Extensive experiments on the Waymo and KITTI benchmarks demonstrate that DriveSplat achieves state-of-the-art performance in novel-view synthesis while producing temporally stable and geometrically consistent reconstructions of dynamic driving scenes. Project page: https://physwm.github.io/drivesplat.

light_analysis.overview: DriveSplat框架通过统一的神经高斯表示，结合静态背景的场景感知LOD建模和动态演员的对象中心变形，实现了大规模动态驾驶场景的有效重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 大规模动态驾驶场景重建面临静态环境深度变化极端和动态演员运动复杂的挑战。现有基于Gaussian Splatting的方法主要针对小规模或对象中心设置，难以处理大规模场景中的尺度变化和非刚性运动，限制了其在真实驾驶环境的应用。本研究旨在解决这一不足，推动高质量场景重建技术的发展，以支持自动驾驶和虚拟现实等实际需求。
light_analysis.method: DriveSplat采用统一的高斯表示框架。针对静态背景，引入场景感知可学习LOD策略，显式建模近、中、远深度范围，实现自适应多尺度高斯分配。对于动态演员，使用对象中心公式和神经高斯基元，通过全局刚性变换和两阶段变形（先调整锚点后更新高斯）处理复杂运动。优化中加入密集深度和表面法线先验作为辅助监督，提升重建精度。
light_analysis.result: 在Waymo和KITTI基准测试中，DriveSplat在新视图合成任务上达到最先进性能，产生时间稳定和几何一致的重建结果。实验表明该方法优于现有方法，有效处理大规模动态场景，具体数据指标未在摘要中明确说明，但验证了其重建质量和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: DriveSplat通过整合静态背景的LOD建模和动态演员的神经高斯表示，成功解决了动态驾驶场景重建问题。该方法提高了重建质量、时间稳定性和几何一致性，具有学术价值（如扩展高斯重建技术）和实际意义（如支持自动驾驶系统）。未来工作可能包括优化性能或应用于更广泛动态场景。

title: Remove360: Benchmarking Residuals After Object Removal in 3D Gaussian Splatting
abstract: An object can disappear from a 3D scene, yet still be detectable. Even after visual removal, modern vision models may infer what was originally present. In this work, we introduce a novel benchmark and evaluation framework to quantify semantic residuals, the unintended cues left behind after object removal in 3D Gaussian Splatting. We conduct experiments across a diverse set of indoor and outdoor scenes, showing that current methods often preserve semantic information despite the absence of visual geometry. Notably, even when removal is followed by inpainting, residual cues frequently remain detectable by foundation models. We also present Remove360, a real-world dataset of pre- and post-removal RGB captures with object-level masks. Unlike prior datasets focused on isolated object instances, Remove360 contains complex, cluttered scenes that enable evaluation of object removal in full-scene settings. By leveraging the ground-truth post-removal images, we directly assess whether semantic presence is eliminated and whether downstream models can still infer what was removed. Our results reveal a consistent gap between geometric removal and semantic erasure, exposing critical limitations in existing 3D editing pipelines and highlighting the need for privacy-aware removal methods that eliminate recoverable cues, not only visible geometry. Dataset and evaluation code are publicly available.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种新基准和评估框架，用于量化3D高斯飞溅中对象移除后的语义残留，旨在评估和提升隐私感知移除技术。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于3D场景中对象移除后，尽管几何结构被删除，但残留的语义线索仍可能被现代视觉模型推断出来，导致隐私泄露等实际问题。现有3D编辑方法主要关注几何移除，而忽视语义残留，这限制了在隐私敏感应用中的有效性。摘要指出，当前方法无法完全消除可恢复的线索，暴露了现有流水线的不足，强调了开发更全面移除技术的需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括提出Remove360基准和评估框架，该框架基于真实世界数据集，包含复杂室内外场景的前后移除RGB捕获和对象级掩码。与先前专注于孤立对象的数据集不同，Remove360支持全场景评估，利用基础模型直接检测语义残留。关键创新在于通过地面实况后移除图像，量化评估移除效果，提供了一个标准化框架来分析几何移除与语义擦除之间的差距。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表显示，现有移除方法常保留语义信息，即使在修复后，残留线索仍可被基础模型检测到，暴露出几何移除与语义擦除之间的一致差距。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，如准确率数据，但强调了当前技术无法完全消除可恢复线索。与基线方法相比，这揭示了对隐私保护的不充分，突出了现有3D编辑流水线的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论指出，本研究暴露了现有3D编辑方法在语义消除上的缺陷，提出了隐私感知移除的重要性，以消除可恢复线索。主要贡献是引入Remove360基准和数据集，推动了学术研究和实际应用，如增强隐私保护技术。未来工作可能包括开发更有效的移除算法和扩展评估到更多场景，具有促进AI安全性和隐私性的价值。

title: Online Convex Optimization with Heavy Tails: Old Algorithms, New Regrets, and Applications
abstract: In Online Convex Optimization (OCO), when the stochastic gradient has a finite variance, many algorithms provably work and guarantee a sublinear regret. However, limited results are known if the gradient estimate has a heavy tail, i.e., the stochastic gradient only admits a finite $\mathsf{p}$-th central moment for some $\mathsf{p}\in\left(1,2\right]$. Motivated by it, this work examines different old algorithms for OCO (e.g., Online Gradient Descent) in the more challenging heavy-tailed setting. Under the standard bounded domain assumption, we establish new regrets for these classical methods without any algorithmic modification. Remarkably, these regret bounds are fully optimal in all parameters (can be achieved even without knowing $\mathsf{p}$), suggesting that OCO with heavy tails can be solved effectively without any extra operation (e.g., gradient clipping). Our new results have several applications. A particularly interesting one is the first provable and optimal convergence result for nonsmooth nonconvex optimization under heavy-tailed noise without gradient clipping. Furthermore, we explore broader settings (e.g., smooth OCO) and extend our ideas to optimistic algorithms to handle different cases simultaneously.
comment: A short, self-contained version has been accepted at ALT 2026. Update to include the change in the camera-ready version

light_analysis.overview: 论文重新评估经典在线凸优化算法在重尾梯度设置下的性能，建立了新的、最优的遗憾界，无需梯度裁剪等额外操作。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线凸优化中，当随机梯度具有有限方差时，现有算法能保证亚线性遗憾。然而，如果梯度估计具有重尾分布，即仅具有有限p阶中心矩（p∈(1,2]），研究结果有限，这在现实噪声环境中很重要，因为梯度可能不服从高斯分布，传统方法如梯度裁剪可能不必要或不有效。
light_analysis.method: 论文研究了经典算法如在线梯度下降，在重尾梯度设置下未作任何算法修改。通过理论分析，建立了新的遗憾界，关键创新在于这些界在所有参数上是最优的，无需知道具体的p值，表明重尾问题可以通过标准算法解决，无需如梯度裁剪的额外操作。
light_analysis.result: 论文证明了在重尾梯度下，经典算法如在线梯度下降能实现新的遗憾界，这些界在所有参数上都是最优的，即使在不知道p值的情况下也能达到。应用之一是在重尾噪声下，首次提供了非光滑非凸优化的证明和最优收敛结果，无需梯度裁剪，与基线方法相比展示了有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献在于展示了重尾梯度下的在线凸优化可通过经典算法有效解决，扩展了理论到更现实的噪声假设，具有学术价值，并提供应用如非凸优化。未来工作可扩展到更广泛的设置，如平滑在线凸优化和乐观算法，以处理不同情况，强调了方法的简洁性和普适性。

title: Infherno: End-to-end Agent-based FHIR Resource Synthesis from Free-form Clinical Notes
abstract: For clinical data integration and healthcare services, the HL7 FHIR standard has established itself as a desirable format for interoperability between complex health data. Previous attempts at automating the translation from free-form clinical notes into structured FHIR resources address narrowly defined tasks and rely on modular approaches or LLMs with instruction tuning and constrained decoding. As those solutions frequently suffer from limited generalizability and structural inconformity, we propose an end-to-end framework powered by LLM agents, code execution, and healthcare terminology database tools to address these issues. Our solution, called Infherno, is designed to adhere to the FHIR document schema and competes well with a human baseline in predicting FHIR resources from unstructured text. The implementation features a front end for custom and synthetic data and both local and proprietary models, supporting clinical data integration processes and interoperability across institutions. Gemini 2.5-Pro excels in our evaluation on synthetic and clinical datasets, yet ambiguity and feasibility of collecting ground-truth data remain open problems.
comment: EACL 2026 System Demonstrations | Code: https://github.com/j-frei/Infherno | Demo: https://infherno.misit-augsburg.de

light_analysis.overview: Infherno 是一个端到端的基于 LLM 代理的框架，用于从自由形式临床笔记自动合成 HL7 FHIR 资源。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决自动化将自由形式临床笔记翻译成结构化 HL7 FHIR 资源的挑战。HL7 FHIR 标准在临床数据集成和医疗保健服务中至关重要，但现有方法局限于狭窄任务，依赖模块化方法或基于指令调优和约束解码的 LLMs，导致泛化能力差和结构不一致。这阻碍了医疗数据的互操作性，影响服务质量，因此需要更通用、一致的端到端解决方案来提升自动化翻译的效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 Infherno 框架，采用 LLM 代理、代码执行和医学术语数据库工具构建端到端解决方案。核心创新包括结合这些技术以确保严格遵循 FHIR 文档模式，实现从前端支持自定义和合成数据到兼容本地和专有模型（如 Gemini 2.5-Pro）的全流程处理。该方法通过直接解析非结构化文本并生成结构化资源，旨在避免先前方法的泛化不足和结构不一致问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Infherno 在合成和临床数据集上表现良好，与人类基线竞争，表明其在预测 FHIR 资源方面具有潜力。Gemini 2.5-Pro 模型在评估中表现出色，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率提升）。评估也指出，模糊性和收集真实数据的可行性仍是开放问题，提示当前成果需更多验证数据支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是 Infherno 框架成功解决了先前方法的限制，通过基于 LLM 代理的端到端设计提升了 FHIR 资源合成的泛化性和结构一致性，对临床数据集成和跨机构互操作性有重要价值。研究的学术贡献在于创新性地结合多种技术优化医疗数据处理，但存在模糊性和真实数据收集的局限性，未来工作可探索更可靠的评估方法或扩展应用场景。

title: On the Surprising Effectiveness of a Single Global Merging in Decentralized Learning
abstract: Decentralized learning provides a scalable alternative to parameter-server-based training, yet its performance is often hindered by limited peer-to-peer communication. In this paper, we study how communication should be scheduled over time, including determining when and how frequently devices synchronize. Counterintuitive empirical results show that concentrating communication budgets in the later stages of decentralized training remarkably improves global test performance. Surprisingly, we uncover that fully connected communication at the final step, implemented by a single global merging, can significantly improve the performance of decentralized learning under high data heterogeneity. Our theoretical contributions, which explain these phenomena, are the first to establish that the globally merged model of decentralized SGD can match the convergence rate of parallel SGD. Technically, we reinterpret part of the discrepancy among local models, which were previously considered as detrimental noise, as constructive components essential for matching this rate. This work provides evidence that decentralized learning is able to generalize under high data heterogeneity and limited communication, while offering broad new avenues for model merging research.
comment: We discover and theoretically explain why and when a single global parameter merging in decentralized learning can recover the performance of federated learning, even in highly heterogeneous and communication-constrained environments

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示了分散学习后期单一全局合并的惊人有效性，能显著提升性能并匹配并行SGD的收敛率。
light_analysis.motivation: 分散学习作为参数服务器训练的可扩展替代方案，性能常受限于点对点通信不足，特别是在高数据异构性下。现有通信调度方法未能有效优化同步时机和频率，导致训练效率低下。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过探索通信时间安排，提升全局性能，这对实现高效、可扩展的机器学习训练至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文研究了通信调度策略，包括决定设备和同步的频率与时机。核心方法是引入单一全局合并，即在分散训练最后一步进行全连接通信。关键创新点在于理论分析中，将本地模型间的差异重新诠释为构造性组件，而非有害噪声，以此匹配并行SGD的收敛率。技术贡献首次证明全局合并模型能实现这一收敛性能。
light_analysis.result: 实证结果显示，在分散训练后期集中通信预算能显著提升全局测试性能，特别是在高数据异构性下。单一全局合并使性能大幅改善，理论分析证实全局合并模型匹配并行SGD的收敛率，优于传统分散学习方法。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是发现并理论解释了单一全局合并的有效性，证实分散学习在高数据异构性和有限通信下的泛化能力。研究开辟了模型合并的新研究方向，具有推动分布式训练优化和实际应用的价值。未来工作可探索更多合并策略，以克服潜在局限性，如通信模式的扩展。

title: SenseShift6D: Multimodal RGB-D Benchmarking for Robust 6D Pose Estimation across Environment and Sensor Variations
abstract: Recent advances on 6D object pose estimation have achieved high performance on representative benchmarks such as LM-O, YCB-V, and T-Less. However, these datasets were captured under fixed illumination and camera settings, leaving the impact of real-world variations in illumination, exposure, gain or depth-sensor mode largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we introduce SenseShift6D, the first RGB-D dataset that physically sweeps 13 RGB exposures, 9 RGB gains, auto-exposure, 4 depth-capture modes, and 5 illumination levels. For six common household objects, we acquire 198.8k RGB and 20.0k depth images (i.e., 795.4k RGB-D scenes), providing 1,380 unique sensor-lighting permutations per object pose. Experiments with state-of-the-art pretrained, generalizable pose estimators reveal substantial performance variation across lighting and sensor settings, despite their large-scale pretraining. Strikingly, even instance-level estimators-trained and tested on identical objects and backgrounds-exhibit pronounced sensitivity to environmental and sensor shifts. These findings establish sensor- and environment-aware robustness as an underexplored yet essential dimension for real-world deployment, and motivate SenseShift6D as a necessary benchmark for the community. Finally, to illustrate the opportunity enabled by this benchmark, we evaluate test-time multimodal sensor selection without retraining. An idealized (oracle) controller yields remarkable gains of up to +16.7 pp for generalizable models, whereas a practical consistency-based proxy improves performance only marginally, highlighting substantial headroom and the need for future research on reliable sensor-aware adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: SenseShift6D是首个物理扫描多种环境和传感器变化的RGB-D基准数据集，用于研究6D物体姿态估计的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有6D物体姿态估计研究在标准基准数据集（如LM-O、YCB-V、T-Less）上表现优异，但这些数据集在固定光照和相机设置下捕获，忽略了真实世界中的环境变化（如光照、曝光、增益）和传感器模式差异。这导致模型在实际部署中可能性能不稳定，鲁棒性不足，难以应对多样化的真实场景。因此，研究传感器和环境变化对姿态估计的影响至关重要，以推动技术在现实应用中的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出了SenseShift6D数据集，通过物理扫描13种RGB曝光、9种RGB增益、自动曝光、4种深度捕获模式和5种光照水平的变化，为六个常见家用物体收集了198.8k RGB图像和20.0k深度图像，共795.4k个RGB-D场景。每个物体姿势有1,380个独特的传感器-光照排列，提供了全面的变化覆盖。实验中评估了现有最先进的预训练和实例级姿态估计器，并测试了测试时多模态传感器选择方法，包括理想控制器和基于一致性的代理。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，现有的最先进预训练和实例级姿态估计器在不同光照和传感器设置下表现出显著的性能波动，尽管经过大规模预训练，仍对环境和传感器变化敏感。具体地，测试时采用理想（oracle）多模态传感器选择控制器可将可泛化模型的性能提升高达+16.7个百分点，而基于一致性的实际代理方法仅带来边际改善。这突出了传感器和环境感知鲁棒性作为未充分探索但关键维度的必要性，并揭示了未来研究的提升空间。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是推出了SenseShift6D数据集，填补了现有基准在评估传感器和环境变化影响方面的空白。该研究强调了这些变化对6D姿态估计鲁棒性的重要性，并为社区提供了必要的基准以推动鲁棒性研究。实验显示了现有方法的局限性，激励未来开发可靠的传感器感知自适应方法，以提高在实际应用中的部署效果和稳定性。

title: Multimodal Fused Learning for Solving the Generalized Traveling Salesman Problem in Robotic Task Planning
abstract: Effective and efficient task planning is essential for mobile robots, especially in applications like warehouse retrieval and environmental monitoring. These tasks often involve selecting one location from each of several target clusters, forming a Generalized Traveling Salesman Problem (GTSP) that remains challenging to solve both accurately and efficiently. To address this, we propose a Multimodal Fused Learning (MMFL) framework that leverages both graph and image-based representations to capture complementary aspects of the problem, and learns a policy capable of generating high-quality task planning schemes in real time. Specifically, we first introduce a coordinate-based image builder that transforms GTSP instances into spatially informative representations. We then design an adaptive resolution scaling strategy to enhance adaptability across different problem scales, and develop a multimodal fusion module with dedicated bottlenecks that enables effective integration of geometric and spatial features. Extensive experiments show that our MMFL approach significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods across various GTSP instances while maintaining the computational efficiency required for real-time robotic applications. Physical robot tests further validate its practical effectiveness in real-world scenarios.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出一个多模态融合学习框架，通过结合图和图像表示，解决机器人任务规划中的广义旅行商问题，以实现实时高质量规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 移动机器人任务规划在仓库检索和环境监测等应用中至关重要，这些任务通常涉及从多个目标集群中各选一个位置，形成广义旅行商问题（GTSP），现有方法难以兼顾解决准确性和效率，制约了实时应用的需求，因此迫切需要开发更高效的算法来提升机器人操作性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出多模态融合学习（MMFL）框架，首先使用基于坐标的图像构建器将GTSP实例转换为空间信息表示，然后设计自适应分辨率缩放策略以适应不同问题规模，并通过多模态融合模块结合几何和空间特征，利用图和图像表示的互补性来优化规划策略，从而提高实时生成任务规划方案的能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MMFL方法在多种GTSP实例上显著优于当前最优方法，同时保持计算效率，满足实时机器人应用需求；物理机器人测试进一步验证了该方法在实际场景中的有效性和实用性，证明了其在复杂任务规划中的优异性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了一个有效的多模态融合学习框架，解决了GTSP在机器人任务规划中的挑战，学术上提升了规划方法的准确性和效率，实际应用中能促进机器人的实时高效操作；未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂的多模态场景或进一步优化融合策略。

title: TR2M: Transferring Monocular Relative Depth to Metric Depth with Language Descriptions and Dual-Level Scale-Oriented Contrast
abstract: This work presents a generalizable framework to transfer relative depth to metric depth. Current monocular depth estimation methods are mainly divided into metric depth estimation (MMDE) and relative depth estimation (MRDE). MMDEs estimate depth in metric scale but are often limited to a specific domain. MRDEs generalize well across different domains, but with uncertain scales which hinders downstream applications. To this end, we aim to build up a framework to solve scale uncertainty and transfer relative depth to metric depth. Previous methods used language as input and estimated two factors for conducting rescaling. Our approach, TR2M, utilizes both text description and image as inputs and estimates two rescale maps to transfer relative depth to metric depth at pixel level. Features from two modalities are fused with a cross-modality attention module to better capture scale information. A strategy is designed to construct and filter confident pseudo metric depth for more comprehensive supervision. We also develop scale-oriented contrastive learning to utilize depth distribution as guidance to enforce the model learning about intrinsic knowledge aligning with the scale distribution. TR2M only exploits a small number of trainable parameters to train on datasets in various domains and experiments not only demonstrate TR2M's great performance in seen datasets but also reveal superior zero-shot capabilities on five unseen datasets. We show the huge potential in pixel-wise transferring relative depth to metric depth with language assistance. (Code is available at: https://github.com/BeileiCui/TR2M)

light_analysis.overview: TR2M提出了一种通用框架，通过结合语言描述和尺度导向对比学习，将单目相对深度转化为度量深度。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前单目深度估计分为度量深度估计（MMDE）和相对深度估计（MRDE）。MMDE局限于特定领域，泛化能力差；MRDE虽能跨领域泛化，但深度尺度不确定，这阻碍了在自动驾驶和机器人等下游应用中的实用性。因此，本研究旨在解决尺度不确定性，构建框架将相对深度转移到度量深度，以提升实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: TR2M框架以文本描述和图像作为双模态输入，通过跨模态注意力模块融合特征，估计两个重缩放图，在像素级实现相对深度到度量深的转换。设计了构造和筛选置信伪度量深度的策略，用于更全面的监督，并引入尺度导向对比学习，利用深度分布作为指导，使模型学习与尺度分布对齐的内在知识。仅使用少量可训练参数在不同领域数据集上进行训练。
light_analysis.result: TR2M在已见数据集上表现出优异性能，同时在五个未见数据集上展现了卓越的零样本能力。这表明模型具有强大的泛化性能，能够有效解决尺度不确定性，为跨领域深度估计提供了可靠解决方案。与基线方法相比，TR2M在未见数据集上实现了显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: TR2M验证了利用语言辅助在像素级转移相对深度到度量深的巨大潜力，为单目深度估计提供了一种通用且高效的框架。该研究不仅提升了深度估计的准确性和泛化能力，还拓宽了实际应用场景，如增强现实和自动驾驶。未来工作可优化跨模态融合和伪深度生成策略，进一步提高性能。

title: Size-adaptive Hypothesis Testing for Fairness
abstract: Determining whether an algorithmic decision-making system discriminates against a specific demographic typically involves comparing a single point estimate of a fairness metric against a predefined threshold. This practice is statistically brittle: it ignores sampling error and treats small demographic subgroups the same as large ones. The problem intensifies in intersectional analyses, where multiple sensitive attributes are considered jointly, giving rise to a larger number of smaller groups. As these groups become more granular, the data representing them becomes too sparse for reliable estimation, and fairness metrics yield excessively wide confidence intervals, precluding meaningful conclusions about potential unfair treatments.   In this paper, we introduce a unified, size-adaptive, hypothesis-testing framework that turns fairness assessment into an evidence-based statistical decision. Our contribution is twofold. (i) For sufficiently large subgroups, we prove a Central-Limit result for the statistical parity difference, leading to analytic confidence intervals and a Wald test whose type-I (false positive) error is guaranteed at level $α$. (ii) For the long tail of small intersectional groups, we derive a fully Bayesian Dirichlet-multinomial estimator; Monte-Carlo credible intervals are calibrated for any sample size and naturally converge to Wald intervals as more data becomes available. We validate our approach empirically on benchmark datasets, demonstrating how our tests provide interpretable, statistically rigorous decisions under varying degrees of data availability and intersectionality.

light_analysis.overview: 本文引入一个大小自适应的假设检验框架，结合统计检验和贝叶斯方法，解决公平性评估中数据稀疏问题，提供统计严格的决策。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前公平性评估通常基于单个点估计值与预设阈值的比较，这种实践统计上脆弱，忽视采样误差，对小型人口亚组与大型组同等处理。问题在交叉分析中加剧，当多个敏感属性联合考虑时，产生更多小群体，数据变得稀疏，导致公平性指标的置信区间过宽，无法得出关于潜在歧视的有意义结论。因此，需要一种能适应不同群体大小、更稳健的统计方法来提高评估的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个统一的大小自适应假设检验框架，将公平性评估转化为基于证据的统计决策。对于足够大的亚组，基于中央极限定理推导统计差异的解析置信区间，使用Wald检验控制类型I错误在水平α。对于小交叉群体，采用全贝叶斯Dirichlet-multinomial估计器，通过Monte-Carlo方法计算可信区间，能在任何样本大小下校准，并在数据增加时自然收敛到Wald区间。该框架融合了经典统计和贝叶斯推断，以适应不同规模群体的数据特性。
light_analysis.result: 在基准数据集上的实证验证显示，该测试能提供可解释的、统计严格的决策，适应不同程度的数据可用性和交叉性。然而，摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标，如准确率提升或与基线方法的详细对比数据，因此无法量化具体效果，仅表明框架在统计上增强了评估的稳健性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了一个大小自适应的假设检验框架，有效应对公平性评估中的数据稀疏挑战。通过结合统计检验和贝叶斯方法，框架提高了对不同大小群体的评估稳健性，学术价值在于推广统计理论在AI公平性领域的应用，实际应用价值在于帮助算法系统更可靠地检测歧视。未来工作可能扩展到其他公平性指标或更复杂的模型场景。

title: Preference-Driven Multi-Objective Combinatorial Optimization with Conditional Computation
abstract: Recent deep reinforcement learning methods have achieved remarkable success in solving multi-objective combinatorial optimization problems (MOCOPs) by decomposing them into multiple subproblems, each associated with a specific weight vector. However, these methods typically treat all subproblems equally and solve them using a single model, hindering the effective exploration of the solution space and thus leading to suboptimal performance. To overcome the limitation, we propose POCCO, a novel plug-and-play framework that enables adaptive selection of model structures for subproblems, which are subsequently optimized based on preference signals rather than explicit reward values. Specifically, we design a conditional computation block that routes subproblems to specialized neural architectures. Moreover, we propose a preference-driven optimization algorithm that learns pairwise preferences between winning and losing solutions. We evaluate the efficacy and versatility of POCCO by applying it to two state-of-the-art neural methods for MOCOPs. Experimental results across four classic MOCOP benchmarks demonstrate its significant superiority and strong generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了 POCCO，一个基于偏好驱动和条件计算的即插即用框架，通过自适应选择模型结构和偏好学习提升多目标组合优化问题的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的深度强化学习方法通过将多目标组合优化问题分解为子问题来求解，但所有子问题被平等对待并使用单一模型，限制了解决方案空间的有效探索，导致性能次优。这一问题在多目标优化中尤为重要，因为子问题的多样性和复杂性未被充分利用，阻碍了算法效率和优化效果的提升。因此，研究旨在克服这些局限性，开发更灵活和有效的优化策略。
light_analysis.method: POCCO 框架包括条件计算块和偏好驱动优化算法。条件计算块根据子问题特点，将其路由到专门的神经架构，实现模型结构自适应选择；偏好驱动优化算法则通过学习获胜与失败解决方案之间的成对偏好，替代传统的显式奖励值优化，以更有效地指导搜索过程。该方法应用于两种最先进的神经方法，涉及多目标组合优化问题的特定架构和数据集细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验在四个经典的多目标组合优化基准上进行，应用了两种最先进的神经方法作为基线。结果表明，POCCO 具有显著的优越性，在优化性能上强于现有方法，并表现出强泛化能力。具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进数据在摘要中未明确说明，但强调了其广泛适用性和提升效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: POCCO 通过引入条件计算和偏好驱动优化，成功解决了现有方法在子问题处理上的局限性，提升了多目标组合优化问题的求解性能。这项研究为组合优化领域提供了新的技术路径，具有实际应用价值，如在资源分配和调度问题中实现更优解。未来工作可包括扩展框架到更多问题类型或进一步优化算法细节。

title: RAISE: Enhancing Scientific Reasoning in LLMs via Step-by-Step Retrieval
abstract: Scientific reasoning requires not only long-chain reasoning processes, but also knowledge of domain-specific terminologies and adaptation to updated findings. To deal with these challenges for scientific reasoning, we introduce RAISE, a step-by-step retrieval-augmented framework which retrieves logically relevant documents from in-the-wild corpus. RAISE is divided into three steps: problem decomposition, logical query generation, and logical retrieval. We observe that RAISE consistently outperforms other baselines on scientific reasoning benchmarks. We analyze that unlike other baselines, RAISE retrieves documents that are not only similar in terms of the domain knowledge, but also documents logically more relevant.

light_analysis.overview: RAISE是一个逐步检索增强框架，通过分步检索逻辑相关文档，有效提升大型语言模型的科学推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学推理需要长链推理过程和领域特定知识，并适应不断更新的科学发现。现有大型语言模型在检索信息时可能侧重于领域相似性，而忽视逻辑相关性，导致推理效果受限。该研究旨在解决这一不足，通过开发RAISE框架，专注于检索逻辑相关的文档，以应对科学推理中的知识获取和逻辑推理挑战。摘要未明确说明现有具体方法的缺陷，但强调了逻辑相关检索的重要性。
light_analysis.method: RAISE框架分为三个核心步骤：问题分解、逻辑查询生成和逻辑检索。首先，问题分解将复杂科学问题拆解为子问题；其次，逻辑查询生成基于分解结果构建检索指令；最后，逻辑检索从开放语料库中检索逻辑相关的文档。关键创新在于强调逻辑相关性而非仅依赖领域知识匹配，但摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 在科学推理基准测试中，RAISE一致优于其他基线方法。分析显示，与其他方法相比，RAISE检索的文档不仅在领域知识上相似，而且在逻辑上更相关，从而提升了推理性能。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升数据，但强调了其相对于基线的持续优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAISE通过引入逐步检索框架，显著提升了大型语言模型在科学推理中的逻辑相关性和表现。其学术价值在于提出了一种结合逻辑检索的新方法，具有实际应用潜力，可用于科学教育、研究辅助等领域。摘要未提及局限性或未来工作方向，因此结论基于现有贡献总结。

title: Auto-Annotation with Expert-Crafted Guidelines: A Study through 3D LiDAR Detection Benchmark
abstract: Data annotation is crucial for developing machine learning solutions. The current paradigm is to hire ordinary human annotators to annotate data instructed by expert-crafted guidelines. As this paradigm is laborious, tedious, and costly, we are motivated to explore auto-annotation with expert-crafted guidelines. To this end, we first develop a supporting benchmark AutoExpert by repurposing the established nuScenes dataset, which has been widely used in autonomous driving research and provides authentic expert-crafted guidelines. The guidelines define 18 object classes using both nuanced language descriptions and a few visual examples, and require annotating objects in LiDAR data with 3D cuboids. Notably, the guidelines do not provide LiDAR visuals to demonstrate how to annotate. Therefore, AutoExpert requires methods to learn on few-shot labeled images and texts to perform 3D detection in LiDAR data. Clearly, the challenges of AutoExpert lie in the data-modality and annotation-task discrepancies. Meanwhile, publicly-available foundation models (FMs) serve as promising tools to tackle these challenges. Hence, we address AutoExpert by leveraging appropriate FMs within a conceptually simple pipeline, which (1) utilizes FMs for 2D object detection and segmentation in RGB images, (2) lifts 2D detections into 3D using known sensor poses, and (3) generates 3D cuboids for the 2D detections. In this pipeline, we progressively refine key components and eventually boost 3D detection mAP to 25.4, significantly higher than 12.1 achieved by prior arts.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种基于专家指南的自动标注方法，通过利用基础模型处理数据模态差异，显著提升了3D LiDAR检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前机器学习数据标注依赖人类标注员依据专家指南进行，这种方式费力、昂贵且低效，限制了AI应用的快速发展。本研究旨在解决自动标注中专家指南与LiDAR数据模态差异的挑战，因为现有方法未能有效结合专家指南实现高效3D检测，导致标注成本高昂且可扩展性差。开发 AutoExpert 基准旨在推动相关研究，以降低标注负担并提高效率。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用一个概念简单的流程：首先利用公开基础模型进行RGB图像的2D对象检测和分割；然后，通过已知传感器姿势将2D检测提升到3D空间；最后，为这些检测生成3D立方体。关键创新在于利用基础模型处理多模态数据，并针对 AutoExpert 基准中的18个对象类进行优化，通过少量标注的图像和文本学习，以应对数据模态和标注任务的差异。
light_analysis.result: 在 AutoExpert 基准上的实验结果显示，通过逐步优化流程中的关键组件，3D检测的平均精度（mAP）提升至25.4，显著高于先前技术（prior arts）的12.1。这一改进证明了所提出方法在自动标注任务中的有效性，突出了基础模型在多模态数据处理中的优势，并为实际应用如自动驾驶提供了性能支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了 AutoExpert 基准并提出了一种基于基础模型的自动标注流程，成功解决了专家指南与LiDAR数据模态差异的挑战。学术上，为自动标注和3D检测提供了新方法；实际上，降低了数据标注成本，促进了自动驾驶等领域的发展。未来工作可进一步优化模型以处理更复杂的场景或扩展到其他模态任务。

title: Video Anomaly Detection with Semantics-Aware Information Bottleneck
abstract: Semi-supervised video anomaly detection methods face two critical challenges: (1) Strong generalization blurs the boundary between normal and abnormal patterns. Although existing approaches attempt to alleviate this issue using memory modules, their rigid prototype-matching process limits adaptability to diverse scenarios; (2) Relying solely on low-level appearance and motion cues makes it difficult to perceive high-level semantic anomalies in complex scenes. To address these limitations, we propose SIB-VAD, a novel framework based on adaptive information bottleneck filtering and semantic-aware enhancement. We propose the Sparse Feature Filtering Module (SFFM) to replace traditional memory modules. It compresses normal features directly into a low-dimensional manifold based on the information bottleneck principle and uses an adaptive routing mechanism to dynamically select the most suitable normal bottleneck subspace. Trained only on normal data, SFFMs only learn normal low-dimensional manifolds, while abnormal features deviate and are effectively filtered. Unlike memory modules, SFFM directly removes abnormal information and adaptively handles scene variations. To improve semantic awareness, we further design a multimodal prediction framework that jointly models appearance, motion, and semantics. Through multimodal consistency constraints and joint error computation, it achieves more robust VAD performance. Experimental results validate the effectiveness of our feature filtering paradigm based on semantics-aware information bottleneck. Project page at https://qzfm.github.io/sib_vad_project_page/

light_analysis.overview: 提出SIB-VAD框架，结合自适应信息瓶颈过滤和语义感知增强，以改进半监督视频异常检测的边界模糊和语义感知问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 半监督视频异常检测面临两个关键挑战：强泛化模糊正常与异常模式的边界，现有方法使用内存模块但原型匹配过程僵化，限制了对多样场景的适应能力；依赖低层外观和运动线索难以感知复杂场景中的高层语义异常，这在实际应用如视频监控中至关重要，因为现有方法缺乏对语义信息的整合，导致检测性能受限。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法包括稀疏特征过滤模块（SFFM），基于信息瓶颈原则将正常特征压缩到低维流形，并使用自适应路由机制动态选择正常瓶颈子空间，训练时仅使用正常数据，使SFFMs学习正常流形而过滤异常特征。同时，设计多模态预测框架，联合建模外观、运动和语义信息，通过一致性约束和联合误差计算来提升语义感知能力，从而实现更鲁棒的检测性能。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，但表示实验结果验证了基于语义感知信息瓶颈的特征过滤范式的有效性，可能包括与基线方法的对比，如在复杂场景中提高了异常检测的准确率和鲁棒性，展示了方法的适应性优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究贡献在于提出SIB-VAD框架，通过信息瓶颈过滤和语义增强解决现有方法的不足，提升了视频异常检测的鲁棒性和适应性，具有潜在学术价值和实际应用，如视频监控领域。未来可探索更多场景扩展和优化细节。

title: Modality Equilibrium Matters: Minor-Modality-Aware Adaptive Alternating for Cross-Modal Memory Enhancement
abstract: Multimodal fusion is susceptible to modality imbalance, where dominant modalities overshadow weak ones, easily leading to biased learning and suboptimal fusion, especially for incomplete modality conditions. To address this problem, we propose a Shapley-guided alternating training framework that adaptively prioritizes minor modalities to balance and thus enhance the fusion. Our method leverages Shapley Value-based scheduling to improve the training sequence adaptively, ensuring that under-optimized modalities receive sufficient learning. Additionally, we introduce the memory module to refine and inherit modality-specific representations with a cross-modal mapping mechanism to align features at both the feature and sample levels. To further validate the adaptability of the proposed approach, the encoder module empirically adopts both conventional and LLM-based backbones. With building up a novel multimodal equilibrium metric, namely, equilibrium deviation metric (EDM), we evaluate the performance in both balance and accuracy across four multimodal benchmark datasets, where our method achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results. Meanwhile, robustness analysis under missing modalities highlights its strong generalization capabilities. Accordingly, our findings reveal the untapped potential of alternating training, demonstrating that strategic modality prioritization fundamentally balances and promotes multimodal learning, offering a new paradigm for optimizing multimodal training dynamics.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于Shapley值引导的交替训练框架和记忆模块，以解决多模态融合中的模态不平衡问题，并取得最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态融合常面临模态不平衡的挑战，主导模态容易掩盖弱势模态，导致学习偏差和融合效果不佳，尤其在缺失模态条件下，现有方法难以有效平衡各模态，从而影响整体性能。这一问题限制了多模态系统的鲁棒性和准确性，因此本研究旨在通过自适应策略优化模态优先处理，以提升融合质量和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种Shapley值引导的交替训练框架，利用基于Shapley值的调度自适应调整训练序列，优先学习弱势模态，确保它们获得足够优化。同时，引入记忆模块，通过跨模态映射机制在特征和样本层面精炼和对齐模态特定表示。编码器模块采用传统和基于大型语言模型（LLM）的骨干网络，以验证方法适应性。此外，开发了新的平衡度量——均衡偏差度量（EDM），用于评估多模态平衡性。
light_analysis.result: 在四个多模态基准数据集上，该方法通过均衡偏差度量（EDM）评估平衡性，在平衡性和准确性方面均实现了最先进（SOTA）的性能。缺失模态下的鲁棒性分析表明，该方法具有良好的泛化能力，能在不完全模态条件下保持稳定表现，突出其在实际应用中的实用性和适应性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了一种新颖的交替训练框架，有效解决多模态融合中的模态不平衡问题，通过战略模态优先平衡了学习过程，提升了性能和鲁棒性。这为优化多模态训练动态提供了新范式，具有学术价值和应用潜力。未来工作可探索方法的扩展或与其他技术的结合。

title: MIPHEI-ViT: Multiplex Immunofluorescence Prediction from H&E Images using ViT Foundation Models
abstract: Histopathological analysis is a cornerstone of cancer diagnosis, with Hematoxylin and Eosin (H&E) staining routinely acquired for every patient to visualize cell morphology and tissue architecture. On the other hand, multiplex immunofluorescence (mIF) enables more precise cell type identification via proteomic markers, but has yet to achieve widespread clinical adoption due to cost and logistical constraints. To bridge this gap, we introduce MIPHEI (Multiplex Immunofluorescence Prediction from H&E Images), a U-Net-inspired architecture that leverages a ViT pathology foundation model as encoder to predict mIF signals from H&E images using rich pretrained representations. MIPHEI targets a comprehensive panel of markers spanning nuclear content, immune lineages (T cells, B cells, myeloid), epithelium, stroma, vasculature, and proliferation. We train our model using the publicly available OrionCRC dataset of restained H&E and mIF images from colorectal cancer tissue, and validate it on five independent datasets: HEMIT, PathoCell, IMMUcan, Lizard and PanNuke. On OrionCRC test set, MIPHEI achieves accurate cell-type classification from H&E alone, with F1 scores of 0.93 for Pan-CK, 0.83 for alpha-SMA, 0.68 for CD3e, 0.36 for CD20, and 0.28 for CD68, substantially outperforming both a state-of-the-art baseline and a random classifier for most markers. Our results indicate that, for some molecular markers, our model captures the complex relationships between nuclear morphologies in their tissue context, as visible in H&E images and molecular markers defining specific cell types. MIPHEI offers a promising step toward enabling cell-type-aware analysis of large-scale H&E datasets, in view of uncovering relationships between spatial cellular organization and patient outcomes.
comment: Accepted manuscript, 24 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables. Published in Computers in Biology and Medicine (DOI: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.compbiomed.2026.111564)

light_analysis.overview: MIPHEI-ViT论文提出一种基于ViT基础模型的U-Net架构，从H&E组织病理学图像预测多路免疫荧光信号，实现细胞类型精准识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于癌症诊断中，H&E染色虽标准但仅能观察细胞形态和组织结构，而多路免疫荧光（mIF）能通过蛋白质标记提供更精确的细胞类型识别，但成本高昂、临床普及受限。现有方法无法直接从低成本H&E图像预测mIF信号，导致诊断精度不足，因此开发此模型以填补技术鸿沟，对提升诊断效率和降低成本具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用MIPHEI架构，受U-Net启发，使用预训练的ViT病理基础模型作为编码器，从H&E图像预测mIF信号。关键创新在于利用ViT的丰富预训练表示提取特征，针对核内容、免疫谱系（如T细胞、B细胞）、上皮组织等多标记面板。训练基于公开的OrionCRC数据集（结肠癌组织的H&E和mIF图像），以增强模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果在OrionCRC测试集上，MIPHEI模型实现准确细胞类型分类，F1分数为Pan-CK 0.93、alpha-SMA 0.83、CD3e 0.68、CD20 0.36、CD68 0.28。这些结果在大多数标记上显著优于最先进基线和随机分类器。模型还在五个独立数据集（HEMIT、PathoCell、IMMUcan、Lizard、PanNuke）上验证，展现出良好泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文结论表明，MIPHEI模型成功捕捉了H&E图像中核形态与分子标记的复杂关系，为大规模H&E数据集的细胞类型感知分析提供新途径。其学术价值在于展示基础模型在医学图像分析中的潜力，实际应用价值在于可能降低mIF成本，助力癌症诊断和患者结果研究。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: SuperDec: 3D Scene Decomposition with Superquadric Primitives
abstract: We present SuperDec, an approach for creating compact 3D scene representations via decomposition into superquadric primitives. While most recent works leverage geometric primitives to obtain photorealistic 3D scene representations, we propose to leverage them to obtain a compact yet expressive representation. We propose to solve the problem locally on individual objects and leverage the capabilities of instance segmentation methods to scale our solution to full 3D scenes. In doing that, we design a new architecture which efficiently decompose point clouds of arbitrary objects in a compact set of superquadrics. We train our architecture on ShapeNet and we prove its generalization capabilities on object instances extracted from the ScanNet++ dataset as well as on full Replica scenes. Finally, we show how a compact representation based on superquadrics can be useful for a diverse range of downstream applications, including robotic tasks and controllable visual content generation and editing.

light_analysis.overview: SuperDec提出了一种通过超二次曲面基元分解来创建紧凑且表达力强的3D场景表示的新方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 在3D计算机视觉中，创建高效且表达力强的场景表示是一个重要挑战。现有方法通常使用几何基元来生成逼真的3D模型，但这些方法往往缺乏紧凑性，导致存储和计算成本高。SuperDec旨在解决这一问题，通过超二次曲面基元提供更紧凑的表示，以支持机器人任务和可控视觉内容生成等下游应用，填补了现有技术在紧凑性和实用性方面的不足。
light_analysis.method: SuperDec方法的核心是设计了一个新架构，用于将点云数据高效分解为超二次曲面基元的集合。该方法采用局部处理策略，首先在单个对象级别进行分解，然后利用实例分割技术扩展到整个3D场景。训练基于ShapeNet数据集，以确保模型能够处理多样对象形状。关键创新点在于结合超二次曲面的表达能力和实例分割的可扩展性，实现任意对象的紧凑表示。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，SuperDec在ShapeNet数据集上训练后，成功泛化到ScanNet++数据集中的对象实例和Replica场景，验证了其有效性和泛化能力。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进，也未提供与基线方法的直接对比，但暗示了紧凑表示在机器人任务和可控视觉内容生成等下游应用中的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SuperDec的主要贡献是提出了一种基于超二次曲面的紧凑3D场景分解方法，显著提升了场景表示的效率和表达力。学术上，它为3D表示学习提供了新工具；实际上，在机器人导航和视觉编辑等领域有重要应用价值。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多基元类型或优化大规模场景处理能力，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Mobile-VideoGPT: Fast and Accurate Model for Mobile Video Understanding
abstract: Video understanding models often struggle with high computational requirements, extensive parameter counts, and slow inference speed, making them inefficient for practical use. To tackle these challenges, we propose Mobile-VideoGPT, an efficient multimodal framework designed to operate with fewer than a billion parameters. Unlike traditional video large multimodal models (LMMs), Mobile-VideoGPT consists of lightweight dual visual encoders, efficient projectors, and a small language model (SLM), enabling real-time throughput. To further improve efficiency, we present an Attention-Based Frame Scoring mechanism to select the key-frames, along with an efficient token projector that prunes redundant visual tokens and preserves essential contextual cues. We evaluate our model across well-established six video understanding benchmarks (e.g., MVBench, EgoSchema, NextQA, and PercepTest). Our results show that Mobile-VideoGPT-0.5B can generate up to 46 tokens per second while outperforming existing state-of-the-art 0.5B-parameter models by 6 points on average with 40% fewer parameters and more than 2x higher throughput. Our code and models are publicly available at: https://github.com/Amshaker/Mobile-VideoGPT.

light_analysis.overview: Mobile-VideoGPT是一种高效的多模态框架，通过轻量级设计和智能帧选择，显著提升移动视频理解的性能和速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频理解模型通常面临高计算需求、参数过多和推理速度慢的挑战，这限制了它们在移动设备等资源受限环境中的实际应用。现有方法如传统大型多模态模型（LMMs）往往参数庞大且效率低下，导致部署困难。因此，开发一个参数少、速度快且性能优秀的模型至关重要，以解决实际场景中的效率问题并推动视频技术的普及。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Mobile-VideoGPT框架，由轻量级双视觉编码器、高效投影器和小型语言模型组成，总计少于十亿参数。关键创新包括基于注意力的帧评分机制，用于选择关键帧以减少冗余计算；以及高效令牌投影器，通过修剪不必要视觉令牌并保留上下文线索来优化处理。这些设计使模型能实现实时吞吐量，适用于移动端部署。
light_analysis.result: 在六个视频理解基准测试中，Mobile-VideoGPT-0.5B每秒可生成多达46个令牌，平均性能优于现有最先进的0.5B参数模型6个点。具体来说，模型参数减少40%，吞吐量提高超过两倍，展示了在降低计算开销的同时保持高准确性的能力，优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: Mobile-VideoGPT的核心贡献是提供了一个高效多模态解决方案，在减少参数和计算需求的同时提升视频理解性能。研究具有重要学术价值，推动了轻量级模型在视频领域的应用；实际应用中，可实现移动设备的实时视频处理。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能涉及进一步优化模型架构或扩展更多任务。

title: Enhancing Multi-Label Emotion Analysis and Corresponding Intensities for Ethiopian Languages
abstract: Developing and integrating emotion-understanding models are essential for a wide range of human-computer interaction tasks, including customer feedback analysis, marketing research, and social media monitoring. Given that users often express multiple emotions simultaneously within a single instance, annotating emotion datasets in a multi-label format is critical for capturing this complexity. The EthioEmo dataset, a multilingual and multi-label emotion dataset for Ethiopian languages, lacks emotion intensity annotations, which are crucial for distinguishing varying degrees of emotion, as not all emotions are expressed with the same intensity. We extend the EthioEmo dataset to address this gap by adding emotion intensity annotations. Furthermore, we benchmark state-of-the-art encoder-only Pretrained Language Models (PLMs) and Large Language Models (LLMs) on this enriched dataset. Our results demonstrate that African-centric encoder-only models consistently outperform open-source LLMs, highlighting the importance of culturally and linguistically tailored small models in emotion understanding. Incorporating an emotion-intensity feature for multi-label emotion classification yields better performance. The data is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Tadesse/EthioEmo-intensities.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过扩展埃塞俄比亚语言情感数据集EthioEmo添加情感强度注释，并验证文化和语言定制的编码器-仅模型在多标签情感分类中的优势。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决埃塞俄比亚语言情感分析中缺乏情感强度注释的问题。现有EthioEmo数据集虽然支持多标签情感分类，但没有强度信息，无法区分用户表达情感的强弱程度，这在人机交互任务如客户反馈分析中至关重要。当前方法不足在于数据集不完整，影响情感分析的准确性，因此本研究扩展数据集以提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括扩展EthioEmo数据集，为其添加情感强度注释以丰富数据内容。技术路线上，对扩展后的数据集进行基准测试，评估最先进的编码器-仅预训练语言模型（如可能基于非洲语言的模型）和开源大型语言模型。关键创新点在于整合情感强度特征到多标签分类任务中，通过对比不同模型在文化和语言特定数据上的表现，探索定制模型的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，以非洲为中心的编码器-仅模型在多标签情感分类任务中 consistently 优于开源大型语言模型，突显了定制模型在情感理解中的有效性。此外，加入情感强度特征后，多标签分类性能进一步提升。与基线方法对比，编码器-仅模型表现出更佳效果，具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但总体趋势支持使用文化和语言定制的小型模型。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是扩展EthioEmo数据集并添加情感强度注释，为低资源语言情感分析提供关键资源。通过基准测试验证了文化和语言定制的编码器-仅模型优于通用大型模型，强调在特定语言任务中定制化方法的重要性。研究具有学术价值，推动多语言情感分析发展，实际应用于改进人机交互系统。未来工作可进一步优化模型或扩展数据集到其他语言。

title: Fin-R1: A Large Language Model for Financial Reasoning through Reinforcement Learning
abstract: In recent years, general-purpose large language models (LLMs) such as GPT, Gemini, Claude, and DeepSeek have advanced at an unprecedented pace. Despite these achievements, their application to finance remains challenging, due to fragmented data sources, intransparent reasoning processes, and weak transferability to business applications. In response, we introduce Fin-R1, a reasoning LLM designed for financial scenarios. With a compact size of 7 billion parameters, Fin-R1 reduces deployment costs while addressing the aforementioned challenges. Its development follows a two-stage pipeline. First, we construct Fin-R1-Data, a high-quality financial dataset consisting of 60,091 chain-of-thought (CoT) samples, distilled and filtered from multiple authoritative benchmarks to ensure consistency and reliability. Second, we train Fin-R1 using Fin-R1-Data through supervised fine-tuning (SFT), followed by reinforcement learning (RL). This stage substantially improves the model's ability to solve complex financial reasoning tasks, yielding outputs that are both accurate and interpretable. Despite its relatively small parameter scale, Fin-R1 achieves competitive empirical performance across established financial benchmarks and demonstrates practical utility in compliance checking and robo-advisory. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/SUFE-AIFLM-Lab/Fin-R1, and has already attracted over 700 stars.

light_analysis.overview: Fin-R1是一个通过强化学习训练的7亿参数大型语言模型，专门用于金融推理任务，结合高质量链式思维数据集和两阶段训练方法实现高效性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年来，通用大型语言模型如GPT等发展迅速，但在金融领域应用面临显著挑战。金融数据源分散且标准不一，导致模型训练困难；推理过程不透明，影响决策可信度；模型在业务场景中迁移性差，难以适应实际需求如合规分析和投资建议。这些因素限制了现有LLMs在金融任务中的实用价值，因此需要开发专门针对金融推理的模型来解决这些不足。
light_analysis.method: Fin-R1的开发采用两阶段流程。首先，构建高质量数据集Fin-R1-Data，包含60,091个链式思维样本，从多个权威基准中提炼和过滤以确保一致性和可靠性。其次，使用该数据集通过监督微调（SFT）训练模型，随后应用强化学习（RL）进行优化，以提升模型在复杂金融推理任务中的准确性和可解释性。模型参数量为7 billion，设计紧凑以降低部署成本，创新点在于结合CoT数据和SFT+RL训练技术。
light_analysis.result: 尽管参数量较小，Fin-R1在多个金融基准测试中展现出竞争性的实证性能，表明其在推理准确性和效率上可与更大模型相当。具体来说，模型在合规检查和机器人顾问等实际应用中显示出实用价值，有效解决了金融推理任务。然而，摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标数据如准确率提升百分比，仅强调其在实际任务中的表现优异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出Fin-R1，一个专门针对金融推理的大型语言模型，通过高质量数据集和强化学习训练实现高效可解释的金融问题解决。其学术价值在于推动了专门领域LLM研究，特别是金融应用；实际价值在于降低部署成本并提升金融任务性能。局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，可能包括进一步优化模型或扩展到更多金融场景。

title: PlainQAFact: Retrieval-augmented Factual Consistency Evaluation Metric for Biomedical Plain Language Summarization
abstract: Hallucinated outputs from large language models (LLMs) pose risks in the medical domain, especially for lay audiences making health-related decisions. Existing automatic factual consistency evaluation methods, such as entailment- and question-answering (QA) -based, struggle with plain language summarization (PLS) due to elaborative explanation phenomenon, which introduces external content (e.g., definitions, background, examples) absent from the scientific abstract to enhance comprehension.
